title: Founder's Associate
office_cadence_note: No cadence stated anywhere. tryspecter.com/careers lists Founder's Associate (Operations) but contains NO work-location/office/remote/hybrid language for any role; apply via Notion link or careers@tryspecter.com. Company HQ is Oxford Street, London (~11-50 staff). Email-apply evergreen role — in-office expectation undatable/unstated; ask directly. Verified 2026-06-10.
key_evidence: Role spans 'product, sales, community, operations, research, hiring' working directly with founders - near-identical to Ryan's actual Minima Founder's Associate -> Community -> Marketing arc

Explicitly wants someone to 'drive community efforts - events, investor/client engagement, nurturing relationships, build a thriving user ecosystem' - direct map to Ryan's 100k Discord/Telegram + ambassador programme spike
Asks 1-2 yrs in VC or fast-growing startup - Ryan has 6.4yr incl 4.4yr at a scaling startup; OVER the bar (slight overqualification risk but reads as strength for an FA)
Wants 'digitally savvy, comfortable diving into tools, workflows, and technical products' - Ryan's AI-tooling/Claude Code work fits
Specter = AI deal-sourcing / startup-data platform; domain is VC/startup-data, adjacent to Ryan's startup-operator + crypto-signal world (not a regulated domain)
Company ~11-50 (LinkedIn ~56 employees), London (Oxford St) - small enough that founders/early team read applications directly = high human-screen, low ATS risk
Apply via careers@tryspecter.com (direct inbox) = clear warm path; founders/team visible on LinkedIn for outreach
Salary GBP42-77k - top of band clears Ryan's 50k floor; bottom of band below it
No structured ATS = email application; thoughtful note + tailored pitch can stand out
biggest_lever: Direct founder-inbox application (careers@tryspecter.com) with a sharp note connecting Ryan's literal FA-at-scaling-startup experience + 100k community build + crypto/startup-signal fluency to Specter's VC/deal-sourcing community mission - bypasses any ATS and lands on a human.
biggest_risk: 1-2yr target suggests they may want a cheaper/junior hire at the lower end of the band (GBP42k floor < Ryan's 50k); Ryan at 6.4yr could read as over-leveled or expensive for an FA seat.
estimation_method: FAILED — no datable signal after exhaustive triangulation. (1) Wayback CDX: specter.careers is an UNRELATED French car/services blog (captures show Porsche 911 Carrera GTS, 'rejoignez-nous', 'la-rebellion' content) — NOT tryspecter's careers page; tryspecter.com/careers* has zero Wayback captures. (2) tryspecter.com listing is JS-rendered, no date/lastmod. (3) Welcome to the Jungle (formerly Otta) company page shows NO open jobs/no FA listing. (4) Not posted on LinkedIn jobs (LinkedIn FA-London search surfaced no tryspecter result). (5) Glassdoor Specter Labs 403. Email-apply evergreen role (careers@tryspecter.com) — genuinely undatable.
recency_note: UNDATABLE after full alt-signal sweep (Wayback CDX, WTJ/Otta, LinkedIn, Glassdoor, Google snippets). Confirmed specter.careers is a different unrelated site (French car blog) — discard it as a date source entirely. Role is a live email-apply evergreen (JD verified character-match on tryspecter.com, 1-2yr VC/startup, GBP42-77k). No posting date exists to recover. Per protocol date-unknown -> G_recency=45 neutral. Callback_v2 unchanged at 71.
momentum_signals: VERY ALIVE SOCIAL CADENCE: LinkedIn (company/specterhq) highly active — weekly 'Specter Monitor' posts, latest ~5 days before run, plus reposts; 20,571 followers, strong engagement (12-243+ reactions). Company is clearly operating and visible (LinkedIn, Jun 2026).

PRODUCT MOMENTUM: shipping fast in 2026 — launched AI Search Agent, AI-powered Data Points, Estimated Stealth Industries + AI Signal Summaries (insights.tryspecter.com, 2026). Active product velocity = a growing, not dormant, company.
HEADCOUNT: ~56 employees on LinkedIn (11-50 band) — stable small team; no explicit '+X% in 6mo' growth signal found.
NO EXPLICIT HIRING POST: no founder 'we're hiring' post found naming the FA role; role is an evergreen careers@tryspecter.com inbox — neutral on hiring-intent freshness.

ROLE-CHURN / DATE: FA seat is genuinely undatable (email-apply evergreen) — could be long-standing/picky; tempers momentum despite a healthy, active company. No negative candidate-treatment signal found (Glassdoor 403).
